ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: I joined the WebMeeeting project as a full stack developer, where I helped launch new products and level up existing ones. My focus was on building real-time features and admin tools that made a real difference for users and the business.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenge
Details: At WebMeeeting, I was at the heart of building a modern web app packed with real-time features. I designed and shipped a live web player using WebSockets, making sure users could interact and get updates instantly.

I built a clean, responsive UI with ReactJS and MaterialUI, so the app looked great and worked smoothly on any device. I used Redux Saga to handle complex state and real-time data flows, keeping everything fast and reliable.
One of my favorite challenges was creating an admin dashboard with Laravel and React, giving the team powerful tools for managing users, content, and reports—all in one place.
Security was always a top priority. I implemented robust authentication and authorization with JWT, making sure only the right people had access to sensitive features.
Throughout the project, I focused on performance, usability, and maintainability, always aiming to deliver features that truly helped the business and its users.
